scriptDescriptions.prereq:check: Check required tooling versions (node, pnpm, docker, compose, sqitch).
scriptDescriptions.infra:reset: Stop and remove infra containers, volumes, and orphans.
scriptDescriptions.infra:logs: Tail docker compose logs for all infra services.
scriptDescriptions.db:deploy: Run Sqitch deploy against dockerized Postgres.
scriptDescriptions.db:verify: Run Sqitch verify against dockerized Postgres.
scriptDescriptions.db:refresh: Deploy then verify DB schema in one command.
scriptDescriptions.web:build: Build the Next.js web app for production.
scriptDescriptions.web:start: Start the built Next.js web app on port 5050.
scriptDescriptions.dev:web: Run web app in development mode on port 5050.
scriptDescriptions.dev:api: Run API in development mode with DB URL and port 5051.
scriptDescriptions.dev: Run both API and web dev servers concurrently.
scriptDescriptions.test:all: Run tests across all workspace packages.
scriptDescriptions.test: Alias for full workspace test run.
scriptDescriptions.verify:confidence: Run API JWT tests, web E2E, web lint, and web production build.
scriptDescriptions.lint: Run lints across all workspace packages.
scriptDescriptions.sqitch:deploy:esg: Run Sqitch deploy against local standalone Postgres URL.
scriptDescriptions.sqitch:verify:esg: Run Sqitch verify against local standalone Postgres URL.
scriptDescriptions.worker:install: Install Graphile Worker schema objects in DB.
scriptDescriptions.worker:run: Start Graphile Worker against local DB.
scriptDescriptions.worker:once: Run Graphile Worker in one-shot mode.
scriptDescriptions.sqitch:deploy:docker: Run Sqitch deploy inside a docker container against compose DB.
scriptDescriptions.sqitch:verify:docker: Run Sqitch verify inside a docker container against compose DB.
scriptDescriptions.seed:pilot-demo: Seed a fully-populated pilot demo tenant and frozen report.
scriptDescriptions.provision:tenant: Provision a pilot tenant, role presets, and starter report.

scripts.prereq:check: node -v && pnpm -v && docker --version && docker compose version && sqitch --version
scripts.verify:confidence: pnpm test:api:jwt && pnpm test:web:e2e && pnpm --filter @apps/web lint && pnpm --filter @apps/web build
scripts.sqitch:deploy:docker: sh -c 'docker run --rm --network container:esg_db -e PGPASSWORD=esg -v "$(pwd)/sql:/work/sql" -w /work/sql sqitch/sqitch deploy db:pg://postgres:esg@127.0.0.1:5432/esg-os'
scripts.sqitch:verify:docker: sh -c 'docker run --rm --network container:esg_db -e PGPASSWORD=esg -v "$(pwd)/sql:/work/sql" -w /work/sql sqitch/sqitch verify db:pg://postgres:esg@127.0.0.1:5432/esg-os'
